aggregateObjective: Implement markdown heading live-preview behavior where '# ' activates headings, inactive markers hide, caret editing reveals markers, and selected/copying headings remain rendered while source markdown is preserved.

goals.objective: Add default-preserving per-range reveal policy support to live-preview filtering.
constraints: Extend LivePreviewRange only with optional metadata
Default undefined behavior must match existing caret-or-selection source reveal behavior
Do not special-case heading renderer ids in generic filtering
verification: Unit tests prove caret-only and never-reveal policies behave as expected
Existing focused source reveal behavior remains covered for default policy

goals.objective: Update heading range generation to require '# ' and apply marker/content reveal policies.
constraints: '#' alone must produce no heading live-preview ranges
'# ' must be accepted as heading syntax
Heading marker replacement ranges reveal only for a collapsed caret
Heading content ranges remain rendered for caret and non-collapsed selection
verification: Tests cover '#', '# ', inactive headings, caret reveal, and selected heading rendering

goals.objective: Run verification, cleanup, independent review, and finalize the durable goal ledger.
constraints: Do not mark complete until targeted tests have evidence
Run independent code-review and resolve high-severity findings
Record final quality-gate evidence in ledger.jsonl
verification: pnpm typecheck and pnpm lint if feasible
independent code-review returns APPROVE or findings are resolved
